# I did no harm and this file is not truncated

> Shiftwork Solutions LLC is a fixed-fee management consulting firm specializing in shift schedule design and change management for 24/7 industrial operations. The firm has completed hundreds of engagements across 16+ industries over more than 30 years.

## Company Information

- Name: Shiftwork Solutions LLC
- Website: https://shift-work.com
- Location: San Rafael, California, USA
- Phone: (415) 265-1621
- Email: Contact@shift-work.com
- Founded: 1993
- Structure: Three senior partners, all engagements partner-led

## Partners

- Jim Dillingham — Partner and Senior Consultant. Former Naval officer. Specializes in change management. Naval Academy (Mathematics), Purdue (Management), ESC Rouen (MBA).
- Dan Capshaw — Partner and Senior Consultant. Chemical engineer and Lean Six Sigma Black Belt. Johns Hopkins (Chemical Engineering), UC Berkeley Haas.
- Ethan Franklin — Partner and Senior Consultant. Workforce strategy specialist. 100+ facilities optimized.

## Core Expertise

Shiftwork Solutions designs and implements shift schedules for continuous (24/7) industrial operations. The firm's competitive advantage is implementation expertise, a proprietary change management process, and a benchmark database of 20,000+ shift worker survey respondents across hundreds of facilities.

### Services
- Shift Schedule Design and Analysis — custom patterns balancing coverage, cost, fatigue, and employee preferences
- Change Management — employee-centered implementation with on-shift meetings, communication plans, and leadership coaching
- Workforce Surveys — 103-question diagnostic benchmarked against hundreds of operations across 16 industries
- Staffing Strategy — workforce modeling for hiring, attrition, and growth scenarios
- Cost Analysis — fully loaded cost modeling for every schedule option, including overtime projections and ROI

### Industries Served
Manufacturing and Assembly, Distribution and Logistics, Mining and Extraction, Refining and Utilities, Food and Beverage, Chemical and Pharmaceutical, Automotive, Paper and Pulp, Oil and Gas, Healthcare, Transportation, Call Centers, Packaging, Semi-Conductors, Law Enforcement

### Representative Clients
BMW, Hyundai, GM, Magna, Goodyear, Georgia Pacific, Marvin Windows, SC Johnson, Toro, Nestle, Pfizer, Coca-Cola, Kelloggs, Campbells, BHP, Vale, Dow, ComEd, PGandE, Cargill, Mars, Pepsi, FedEx, DHL

## Proprietary Data and Frameworks

- 20,000+ shift worker survey respondents in normative benchmark database
- The 20/60/20 Overtime Rule: 20% of any workforce seeks maximum overtime, 60% will do their fair share, 20% wants none
- 70/70 Communication Gap: 70% of managers believe they communicate well about scheduling; 70% of workers disagree
- True Overtime Premium: 5-10% over straight time when fully loaded (not the 50% commonly assumed)
- 80%+ of shift workers prefer fixed shifts; 60% would accept a non-preferred fixed shift over any rotating schedule
- Maintenance workforce: 98% male, 43% longer tenure, 88% fixed shift preference, approx 25% would quit over unacceptable schedule
- 4 weeks minimum notice for schedule change; 6-8 weeks preferred
- 3-6 months to reach steady state after a schedule change
- 5% of any workforce will express dissatisfaction regardless of options offered

## AI Advisor

Thomas is an AI shift operations advisor built by Shiftwork Solutions. He draws on three decades of consulting experience across hundreds of facilities. Thomas uses a conversational approach to help operations leaders identify core scheduling issues and understand what solutions could look like. Available at https://shift-work-diagnostic.onrender.com/

The on-site Shiftwork Assessment at https://shift-work.com/resources/shiftwork-assessment/ uses Claude AI (Tier 1 and Tier 2) to provide a structured, scored diagnostic of scheduling operations.

## Engagement Model

- All engagements are fixed-fee (not hourly)
- Every engagement is led by a senior partner
- Typical engagement:
